title: DHSC group accounting manual 2025 to 2026
body: "The Department of Health and Social Care (DHSC) group accounting manual (GAM) includes mandatory accounting guidance for DHSC group bodies completing statutory annual reports and accounts.  These group bodies include:   integrated care boards NHS trusts NHS foundation trusts arm’s length bodies   The GAM is approved by the HM Treasury financial reporting advisory board. It’s based on the 2025 to 2026 Government Financial Reporting Manual.  "
